nasb.text: ‘Do not profane your daughter by making her a harlot, so that the land will not fall to harlotry and the land become full of lewdness.

esv.text: “Do not profane your daughter by making her a prostitute, lest the land fall into prostitution and the land become full of depravity.

cnv.text: “不可辱沒你的女兒，使她作娼妓，免得這地淫亂，充滿醜惡的事。

ccb.text: 不可辱没自己的女儿，使她沦为娼妓，免得你们居住的地方充满淫乱和邪恶。
